globalNews.title: At least 100 deaths reported in Ebola outbreak in DR Congo as six Americans exposed
globalNews.summary: One of the six Americans is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports. One province in Congo reports 390 cases.

globalNews.title: Judge rules gun and writings are admissible in Luigi Mangione's New York murder trial
globalNews.summary: Other items found with Mangione at a Pennsylvania McDonald's will not be allowed to be presented in court, the judge ruled.

globalNews.title: Two men arrested over stunt at enclosure of famed monkey Punch
globalNews.summary: Two US nationals have been arrested after one jumped the fence of the monkey, who went viral online, police say.

globalNews.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed by graduates at mention of AI
globalNews.summary: The reaction underscores a growing anxiety among students over AI's impact on jobs and their future careers.

globalNews.title: What is Ebola and why is stopping this outbreak so difficult?
globalNews.summary: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum traders say bears ‘in control’ after ETH price drop to $2K
cryptoNews.summary: Ether price fell sharply below $2,100 as increasing sell pressure on Binance and persistent ETF outflows fueled bearish momentum.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid eyes 55% price rise after Silicon Valley investor's 'massive HYPE buy'
cryptoNews.summary: A bullish long-term chart pattern puts HYPE on track for a potential rally above $70 this year, with a16z-linked accumulation and fresh institutional catalysts strengthening the case.

cryptoNews.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
cryptoNews.summary: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin Depot stock crashes 71% premarket after Chapter 11 filing
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 in Texas, plans asset sale and wind-down as regulatory pressure forces shutdown of its Bitcoin ATM network.

cryptoNews.title: Deploi Launches Direct Issuance Infrastructure for Private Credit on Polygon, Secures ISIN Allocations from Nasdaq CSD
cryptoNews.summary: EUR 1 billion note programme planned for 2026 following completion of global issuance infrastructure by the end of Q3 2026.

aiNews.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
aiNews.summary: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

aiNews.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
aiNews.summary: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

aiNews.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
aiNews.summary: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

aiNews.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
aiNews.summary: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

aiNews.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
aiNews.summary: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
